---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement to Agent Quality MCP
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve? What can't you do today?

## Proposed Behavior

What should `validate_patch`, `inspect_workspace`, or the server's
configuration/CLI do instead?

## Alternatives Considered

Any other approaches you considered, and why you didn't prefer them.

## Additional Context

Anything else relevant (links, examples, related issues).
